zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucinda Freeman於1756年出生在美國北卡羅來納州韋克時，她的父親John Freeman Sr.17歲，母親Martha Lynn15歲。她和Noel Posey Massey至少有14個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1826年在美國南卡羅來納州安德森宏內亞 帕斯享年70歲，埋葬在美國南卡羅來納州安德森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucinda Freeman于1756年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州韋克时，她的父亲John Freeman Sr.17岁，母亲Martha Lynn15岁。她和Noel Posey Massey至少有14个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1826年在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森宏內亞 帕斯享年70岁，埋葬在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: Lucinda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Derivative of Lucia , with the addition of the productive suffix -inda. The formation is first found in Cervantes's Don Quixote ( 1605 ), but was not much in use in the 17th century except as a literary name. Lucinde was used by both Molière (in Le Médecin malgré lui, 1665 ) and Friedrich von Schlegel (in his novel Lucinde, 1799 ). It enjoyed considerable popularity in England in the 18th century, and has been in use ever since.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Gold Nuggets Found
historicEvents.description: "In 1799, in Little Meadow Creak located in Cabarrus County, North Carolina a large yellow """"rock"""" was found by Conrad Reed. A few years later it was determined that the """"rock"""" was a gold nugget."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Legends of America- Reed Gold Mine, North Carolina- First Gold Discovery

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Slave Rebellion
historicEvents.description: "On June 16, 1822,  Denmark Vesey a free and self-educated African American leads a slave rebellion called ""the rising."" The interesting thing about this rebellion is that it does not really happen. The only thing the judges have to go on is the testimony of people that witness it."

en.lifeSummary: When Lucinda Freeman was born in 1756, in Wake, North Carolina, United States, her father, John Freeman Sr., was 17 and her mother, Martha Lynn, was 15. She had at least 14 sons and 5 daughters with Noel Posey Massey. She died in 1826, in Honea Path, Anderson, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 70, and was buried in Anderson, South Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucinda Freeman est née en 1756, à Wake, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, son père, John Freeman Sr., avait 17 ans et sa mère, Martha Lynn, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 14 fils et 5 filles avec Noel Posey Massey. Elle est décédée en 1826, à Honea Path, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucinda Freeman 1756 in Wake, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Freeman Sr. 17 und ihre Mutter Martha Lynn 15. Sie hatte mit Noel Posey Massey mindestens 14 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1826 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Honea Path, Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucinda Freeman è nata il nel 1756 nel Wake, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Freeman Sr., aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Martha Lynn, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 14 figli e 5 figlie con Noel Posey Massey. Morì nel 1826, nel Honea Path, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucinda Freemanが1756年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ワクで生まれた時，父John Freeman Sr.は17歳，母Martha Lynnは15歳であった。彼女はNoel Posey Masseyとの間に少なくとも14人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1826年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンホーンエア プアスで70歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンにて埋葬された。

ko.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크
ko.Honea Path, Anderson, South Carolina, Un: 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 호니아 패스
ko.lifeSummary: Lucinda Freeman(이)가 1756년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Freeman Sr.(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Lynn(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Noel Posey Massey(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1826년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 호니아 패스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucinda Freeman nasceu em 1756, em Wake, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Freeman Sr., tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Martha Lynn, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 14 filhos e 5 filhas com Noel Posey Massey. Ela faleceu em 1826, em Honea Path, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucinda Freeman родилась в 1756 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Freeman Sr. было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Lynn, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Noel Posey Massey. Она умерла в 1826 г. в местности хоунеа пат, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucinda Freeman nació en 1756, en Wake, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Freeman Sr., tenía 17 años y su mamá, Martha Lynn, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 14 hijos y 5 hijas con Noel Posey Massey. Murió en 1826, en Honea Path, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos.
